title: draba humillima
intro: Draba humillima, also known as the "Low Draba" or "Small Whitlow Grass", is a low-growing, flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been utilized in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Draba humillima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
